mode.description: Context management strategy: keep-last-n truncates to N recent turns; summary compresses history into a summary

triggerMode.description: Trigger metric: token-ratio fires on token usage ratio; turn-count fires on interaction count (default: token-ratio)

triggerTurnCount.description: Trigger threshold for turn-count mode — fire when turns exceed this value (default: 10)

keepLastN.description: Number of interaction turns to keep in keep-last-n mode (default: 5)

contextWindow.description: Override model context window size in tokens (default: inferred from tokenBudget)
